reasoning: Mixed sector signals with narrow breadth. XLE (+1.33%) and XLK (+0.68%) both rallying premarket, but XLF flat/down (-0.12%) creates dispersion — no clean risk-on (would require XLF participation). Energy strength suggests inflation sensitivity rather than growth momentum. Critical red flag: SPY moving only +0.09% while components rally +0.68% to +1.33% indicates concentrated breadth, not broad-based upside. Rotation is unclear, breadth is weak, directional conviction lacking.
key_observations: XLK: +0.68% — tech showing moderate strength, above 0.5% threshold
XLF: -0.12% — financials NOT participating in the rally, breaks bullish picture
XLE: +1.33% — unusually strong premarket energy rally, suggests inflation rotation not growth risk-on
Breadth concern: SPY barely moving (+0.09%) while sectors show +0.68% to +1.33% — concentrated move, not broad
Rotation verdict: Neither clean risk-on (XLF missing) nor risk-off (both XLK and XLE up) — mixed/transition state unclear
